titleStmt.title: SII 17.403: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 403. (A.R. No. 373 of 1904). PAḺAṈI, DINDIGUL TALUK, MADURAI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north base of the Paḻaṉi-Āṇḍavar shrine.
For the reason stated in No. 402 above the king of this record may be identified with Jatāvarmaṉ Vīrapāṇḍya.

This records the grant by the king, of land in the southern portion of Iḍumbaṉkuḷam alias kuṉṟaṉ-vayal alias Vīraśōḻaṉ-maṉṉaṟai after making the lands free from taxes such as kāttigai-ppachchai and antarāyam for services and offerings to god Subrahmaṇya on the Paḻaṉi hill in Vaikāvūr-nāḍu.
Among the lands excluded from the gift land is mentioned the tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam land of Lakshmīnārāyaṇa Perumāḷ temple.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvaṉaccakra vatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ virapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉaiñcāvatiṉ Etir yāṇṭu Añcāvatu vaikāvūrnāṭṭup paḻaṉiyil malaiyil subramaṇya ppiḷḷaiyār koyilil tevarkaimikaḷukkuRead *kaṉmikaḷukku.Ippiḷḷaiyārkku Iṭumpaṉkuḷamāṉa kuṉṟaṉ vayalāṉa viracoḻaṉ maṉṉaṟaiyil Itaṉkaraikku nāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻpārkkellai Ikkuḷattil nir kovaikkum paḻaṉi Ūrvāykkāluk
kum meṟkum teṉpārkkellai vaṟaḷaṉ Āṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai piramakuḷat tukkup pokiṟa vaḻikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai paḻaṉi Ūr vāykkālukkut teṟ kum Innāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilattil Ilakṣuminārāyaṇapperumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam nilam Orumā nikki niṉṟa nilattil paḻantevatāṉamāṉa nilam Arai māvum nikki nikki niṉṟa nilamum puṉceyyum cittirai mātam mutal Innāyiṉā
ṟkut tiruppaṇikkum Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa palapaṭi nimantaṅkaḷukkum kuṭuttom Ikkuḷattukku Iṟuppiṉpaṭiyāluḷḷa poṉṉum nellum kāttikaippaccai Antarā yam Uḷḷiṭṭavaiyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭavaṉaittu vaṟkamum kaḻittu variyilār kaṇakkiluṅ kaḻikkac coṉṉom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai cātaṉamākak koṇṭu Ikkuḷam cantirātit tavaṟ celvatāka kalliluñ cempil
lum veṭṭik koḷka Ivai Āṉāntūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu 2 yāṇṭu pati ṉaiñcāvatiṉ Etiryāṇṭu Aiñcāvatu nāḷ 3 100 3 tulyayam māhecura rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 17.403 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
